title: lastrea goldieana
intro: Lastrea goldieana, also known as the Goldie's Lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It is native to Australia and is commonly found in the eastern regions, growing in shaded, humid environments. The medicinal properties of Lastrea goldieana include its ability to reduce inflammation and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Lastrea goldieana include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, with herbal preparations often involving the plant's leaves being made into teas or tinctures.
